title: Remove and replace vehicle supplementary restraint systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove and replace vehicle supplementary restraint systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove and replace vehicle SRS

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 SRS removal and replacement specifications are sourced from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency, and are interpreted1.3 SRS component requiring removal and replacement is identified and selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Hand and power tools, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and procedures are determined to minimise waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 SRS removal and replacement specifications are sourced from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency, and are interpreted1.3 SRS component requiring removal and replacement is identified and selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Hand and power tools, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and procedures are determined to minimise waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 SRS removal and replacement specifications are sourced from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency, and are interpreted1.3 SRS component requiring removal and replacement is identified and selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Hand and power tools, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and procedures are determined to minimise waste.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove and replace vehicle SRS

elements.title: Deactivate and remove SRS

pcs.text: SRS is deactivated according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 SRS is removed according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to system or components2.3 SRS component is tagged and stored according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can SRS is deactivated according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 SRS is removed according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to system or components2.3 SRS component is tagged and stored according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods and workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Deactivate and remove SRS

elements.title: Replace SRS

pcs.text: SRS component is checked and matched to vehicle3.2 SRS is replaced according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to system or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can SRS component is checked and matched to vehicle3.2 SRS is replaced according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to system or components?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Replace SRS

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Replaced SRS components are disposed of according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods4.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.4 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.5 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Replaced SRS components are disposed of according to OEM or authorised agency approved methods4.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.4 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.5 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
